chapter_title.en: Chapter 26 – The rinsing of the mouth and the inhalation, for the Fasting one

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/284)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/284)
text: الصَّائِمِ يَتَمَضْمَضُ قَالَ لَا يَبْلَعْ رِيقَهُ حَتَّى يَبْزُقَ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, from Yunus, from Abu Jameela, from Zayd,
(It has been narrated) from Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the Fasting one rinsing his mouth. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should not swallow his saliva until he spits it out three times’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Isma‘il ibn Marrar from Yunus from abu Jamilah from Zayd who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who rinses his mouth when he is fasting. He (the Imam) said, ‘He must not swallow his saliva before discharging it out of his mouth three times.’”
